---
title: "Get ADHD medications from OpenPrescribing"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
library(DBI)
library(bigrquery)
library(dplyr)
library(dbplyr)
library(here)
library(tidyverse)

source(here("functions", "opr.R"))
```



```{r}
#| label: connect-bq
con <- connect_openprescribing()
```


```{r}
#| label: get-gp-prescribing

adhd_med_bnf_codes <- c(
    "0404000S0AAAHAH"
)

query_gp_prescribing <- get_gp_prescribing(
    con,
    bnf_codes = adhd_med_bnf_codes,
    start_date = "2025-04-01",
    end_date = "2025-07-01"
)

df_gp_prescribing <- query_gp_prescribing |> 
    collect()

write_csv(
    df_gp_prescribing, 
    here("output", "openprescribing", "adhd_gp_prescribing.csv")
)
```
